title: Varn (disambiguation)
content:
The name '''Varn''' can refer to:

{{Incomplete list}}

==[[Star Wars Legends|Legends]]==
*'''[[Varn]]''', a planet

*'''[[Varn (individual)|Varn]]''', an individual and aide to [[Tyrann]]
*'''[[Varn (Zabrak)|Varn]]''', a [[Order of Revan|Revanite]]
*'''[[Montra Varn]]''', a [[Lieutenant/Legends|lieutenant]] with the [[Imperial Security Bureau/Legends|Imperial Security Bureau]]
